scripts.install:all: npm --prefix booking-app install && npm --prefix offer-list-app install && npm --prefix offer-detail-app install
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm --prefix booking-app start" "npm --prefix offer-list-app start" "npm --prefix offer-detail-app start"
scripts.build:all: concurrently "npm --prefix booking-app run build" "npm --prefix offer-list-app run build" "npm --prefix offer-detail-app run build"
